personal.preferred_title: AWS Data Engineer | PySpark, SQL, Databricks & Lakehouse Patterns

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building scalable data pipelines, AWS data platform patterns, PySpark/Spark workflows, data lake and warehouse solutions, and ML-ready analytics datasets. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PySpark, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, ETL/ELT, data quality, performance tuning, data governance, security-aware delivery, and production troubleshooting. Experienced with lakehouse concepts, Delta Lake and Databricks learning, and translating operational data into reliable curated datasets for analytics, forecasting, BI, and AI/ML consumption.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Built AWS-oriented data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue for ETL, Athena-style lake access, and Redshift for analytics and ML forecasting workloads.
Developed scalable data processing workflows using Python, SQL, PySpark, Spark, Pandas, AWS services, Oracle, and Redshift to support forecasting, reporting, and operational analytics.
Designed curated reporting datasets, historical schemas, and warehouse structures to support retention, seasonal forecasting, capacity risk analysis, and executive reporting.
Implemented data cleansing, validation, reconciliation, and troubleshooting routines to improve quality, consistency, and reliability of production datasets.
Tuned SQL queries, storage structures, and pipeline workflows for performance, maintainability, and recurring production use.
Containerized Python ETL pipeline jobs on EC2/ECS, supporting repeatable execution, scalable processing, and production troubleshooting.
Supported governance and security expectations in a regulated banking environment, including access awareness, retention logic, documentation, and compliance-minded delivery.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting production visibility, transaction tracing, and performance troubleshooting.
Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, production visibility, and support requirements.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate recurring performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and operational reports used by application and infrastructure teams.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, and client training materials for monitoring onboarding, reporting, and production operations.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap usage, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for production release decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting very high transaction volume.
Built validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to protect integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Produced technical documentation and maintained disciplined delivery practices for regulated system development.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Maintained billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, reporting, and support modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.AWS Data Engineering: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Data Lake Patterns, Cloud Data Pipelines, Serverless Data Platform Design
skills.Databricks & Lakehouse: Databricks Concepts, Delta Lake, Lakehouse Architecture, Medallion Architecture, Unity Catalog Concepts, Delta Live Tables Concepts, Databricks Workflows Concepts
skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, PySpark, Apache Spark, Pandas, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, Java, C++
skills.ETL/ELT & Data Quality: ETL/ELT Pipelines, Data Ingestion, Transformation, Curation, Data Storage, Data Quality Checks, Validation, Reconciliation, Metadata Management, Lineage Concepts
skills.Performance & Production: Spark Job Tuning Concepts, SQL Performance Tuning, Pipeline Troubleshooting, Production Support, Monitoring, Alerting, Root Cause Analysis, Cost-Aware Processing
skills.Security & Governance: RBAC Concepts, Encryption Concepts, Access Control Awareness, Data Masking Concepts, Regulated Banking Environments, Compliance-Aware Delivery
skills.Streaming & Batch: Batch Processing, Distributed Processing, Kafka Concepts, AWS Kinesis Concepts, Streaming Architecture Concepts, Real-Time Analytics Concepts
skills.DevOps & Delivery: Docker, Git, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Linux/Unix, Technical Documentation, Code Review, Agile Collaboration, Terraform Fundamentals
skills.Analytics & AI/ML: BI Dataset Preparation, ML-Ready Datasets, Prophet, scikit-learn, Capacity Forecasting, RAG / Vector Embeddings, GenAI / LLM Agents
skills.Observability: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, Dynatrace AppMon, AppDynamics, Synthetic Monitoring, Transaction Tracing

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and AI-enabled access patterns for enterprise-scale analytics.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting engine using Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. Prepared telemetry datasets for forecasting, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and predicted capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, resume tailoring, quality gates, and application tracking using FAISS, sentence-transformers, and Grok API.
